title: Announcements
content:
Announcements

Erasmus+

Announcements

Erasmus+ Foreign Language Exam Results and Objection Process

08
						December

2025

Dear Students,

The results of the Erasmus+ Language Exam, which was held between December 2–4, 2025, are announced below.

Candidates who wish to object to their exam result must send their petition to

erasmus@okan.edu.tr

by 14.12.2025 at 23:59

.

Objection Dates: 08.12.2025 – 14.12.2025 (23:59)

The winners will be determined by taking into account the average scores of the candidates who have obtained a minimum average of 60 in the Erasmus language exam.  (Grade Point Average: 50%, Language Exam Result: 50%)

The Erasmus Final Score Results will be announced in our next notice.

Candidates who did not take the Erasmus language proficiency exam conducted by our Foreign Languages Coordinatorship but will submit a nationally or internationally recognized language certificate must send it to

erasmus@okan.edu.tr

by 14.12.2025 at 23:59.

Click for Erasmus+ Foreign Language Exam results.
